channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Main findings from the first week of Australia's antisemitism royal commission
item.description: The Royal Commission on Antisemitism and Social Cohesion, established following the December 2025 Bondi terror attack, has concluded its first week of hearings focusing on the experiences of Jewish Au...

item.title: Australian women charged with IS-related offences remain in custody after returning from Syria
item.description: Janai Safar, a 32-year-old Australian woman, has been denied bail in Sydney after being charged with joining Islamic State (IS) in Syria. Safar was arrested at Sydney airport following nearly a decade...

item.title: Tanzania positions itself to grow bee products exports to Asia with global market at 18 billion dollars
item.description: Tanzania is working hard to take advantage of the growing global bee products market, which is now valued at about 18 billion US dollars. The country wants to send more honey, beeswax and other bee it...

item.title: Labour suffers heavy losses in local elections as Starmer accepts responsibility
item.description: Labour leader Sir Keir Starmer has acknowledged responsibility for a series of disappointing local election results, which have seen the party lose hundreds of councillors and eight local authorities ...

item.title: Nationwide Vigils Honour the Life of 5-Year-Old Kumanjayi Little Baby
item.description: Thousands of Australians came together in a heartfelt display of grief following the tragic death of 5-year-old Kumanjayi Little Baby. Candlelight vigils were held in Alice Springs and approximately 3...

item.title: Harry Styles releases Dance No More music video showcasing elaborate choreography and disco-inspired dance
item.description: Harry Styles has unveiled the music video for his latest single, Dance No More, which has drawn significant attention from fans for its elaborate dance sequences and suggestive choreography. The 32-ye...

item.title: Australia imposes counter-terrorism sanctions on BLA and its senior leaders
item.description: On 8th May 2026, Australia imposed counter-terrorism sanctions on the Balochistan Liberation Army (BLA) and three of its senior leaders. According to a statement from Foreign Minister Penny Wong’s off...

item.title: ANU faces maladministration finding over council complaint procedures
item.description: The Australian National University (ANU) has been formally found to have engaged in maladministration concerning the handling of complaints involving members of its council. This follows a review cond...

item.title: Landslides in Murang'a Kill One and Displace Over 200 Households
item.description: Heavy rains in Central Kenya have caused destructive landslides in Murang'a County, affecting Kangema, Mathioya, and neighbouring areas. Tragically, one person lost their life in Ngutu area, Gitugi Wa...

item.title: Billy Monama curates The Rebirth of Ubuntu to honour South African musical heritage and history
item.description: Billy Monama’s concert series, The Rebirth of Ubuntu, is set for its fifth edition at the Joburg Theatre on 29 and 30 May, featuring artists like Lira, Zoë Modiga and Vusi Nova, alongside a 20-piece o...

item.title: P.E.I. mothers seek legislation to support families of runaway teens
item.description: In Prince Edward Island, several mothers are urging the provincial government to introduce new legislation aimed at providing more support for families whose teenagers repeatedly run away from home. T...

item.title: A child does not guarantee commitment in a relationship
item.description: As Mother’s Day approaches, the writer advises women to reconsider using pregnancy as a strategy to secure a man's commitment. Motherhood is beautiful and rewarding, but it demands emotional maturity,...

item.title: Ex-lawmaker Nicholas Ossai Seeks Return to House of Representatives Under APC
item.description: Nicholas Ossai, former member of the House of Representatives for Ndokwa East/Ndokwa West/Ukwuani Federal Constituency in Delta State, don officially submit him nomination form to contest again for hi...

item.title: Barack Obama Delivers Keynote Address During Toronto Visit
item.description: Former U.S. President Barack Obama visited Toronto to deliver a keynote speech, drawing attention from local media and citizens. The visit was part of his ongoing international engagements where he ad...

item.title: Government Considers Shifting BISP Administration to Provincial Authorities
item.description: The federal government of Pakistan is reviewing the possibility of devolving the Benazir Income Support Programme (BISP) to provincial governments, clarified Minister of State for Religious Affairs an...

item.title: Retired economist prefers strong drinks over lagers
item.description: One afternoon at a small local bar, a retired economist named Muga enjoys his drinks while chatting with a friend. Despite being past retirement age, Muga continues to work as a consultant for a gover...

item.title: Honouring Africa's Black and Coloured Soldiers of World War II
item.description: On the 9th of May 1945, while the world celebrated the end of the Second World War, tens of thousands of Black and Coloured men from South Africa and across the African continent were largely forgotte...

item.title: Puregold Operator Reports 21% Growth in Q1 Net Income
item.description: The operator of Puregold, one of the Philippines' leading retail supermarket chains, has reported a notable 21 percent increase in net income for the first quarter of 2026. This growth reflects the co...

item.title: NSW Audit Office criticises handling of regional roads fund and rushed Thornton bridge project
item.description: A report from the NSW Audit Office has raised concerns about the management of a $334 million regional roads fund promised by NSW Labor ahead of the last state election. Roads and Regional Transport M...

item.title: Diablo 4 Secret Cow Level Discovered by Players After Years of Searching
item.description: After years of speculation, teases from developers, and dedicated searching by the community, Diablo 4 players have finally uncovered the long-rumored secret cow level. The discovery comes more than t...
